name: add_prefix_suffix
description: Add prefix and/or suffix to existing parameter values without overwriting

name: add_shared_parameter
description: Add a shared parameter from the shared parameter file to specified categories

name: ai_element_filter
description: AI element filter for querying elements by criteria

filterCategory.description: If null or empty, no category filtering is applied.

filterElementType.description: If null or empty, no type filtering is applied.

filterFamilySymbolId.description: Note: This filter only applies to element instances, not to type elements.

includeTypes.description: Gets or sets whether to include element types (e.g. wall types, door types, etc.)

includeInstances.description: Gets or sets whether to include element instances (e.g. placed walls, doors, etc.)

filterVisibleInCurrentView.description: Note: This filter only applies to element instances, not to type elements.

boundingBoxMin.description: If this value and BoundingBoxMax are set, elements intersecting this bounding box will be filtered.

boundingBoxMax.description: If this value and BoundingBoxMin are set, elements intersecting this bounding box will be filtered.

name: align_viewports
description: Align viewports across sheets to match a reference viewport position

name: analyze_model_statistics
description: Analyze model complexity with element counts by category, type, family, and level

name: apply_view_template
description: List, apply, or remove view templates on views for consistent drawing standards

name: audit_families
description: Comprehensive family audit with health score, unused detection, and recommendations

name: batch_create_sheets
description: Create multiple sheets with title blocks and optional view placement

name: batch_export
description: Export sheets/views to PDF, DWG, or IFC format

name: batch_modify_view_range
description: Batch modify view range settings on multiple plan views at once

name: batch_rename
description: Batch rename views, sheets, or elements using find/replace or prefix/suffix rules

name: bulk_modify_parameter_values
description: Bulk modify parameter values: set, prefix, suffix, find/replace, or clear on multiple elements

name: cad_link_cleanup
description: List, audit, and delete CAD imports and links from the model for cleanup

name: change_element_type
description: Batch swap family types on multiple elements at once (e.g., change all doors from one type to another)

name: check_family_health
description: Analyze the health and statistics of families in the model: instance count, type count, size, editability

name: check_model_health
description: Comprehensive BIM model health audit with scoring and recommendations

name: clash_detection
description: Detect geometric intersections between element categories or specific elements for coordination

name: clear_parameter_values
description: Clear parameter values across multiple elements (string to empty, numeric to 0, ElementId to invalid)

name: color_splash
description: Color elements by parameter value

name: copy_elements
description: Copy elements between views within the same document

name: create_array
description: Create linear or radial arrays of elements

name: create_callout_from_rooms
description: Create callout views for rooms with boundary offset

name: create_color_legend
description: Colorize elements by parameter value with auto/gradient/custom schemes and generate a legend view.

name: create_dimensions
description: Create dimension annotations between elements or points in the current view

linePoint.description: Dimension line point - location of dimension line (mm)

viewId.description: View ID - view to create dimension in

name: create_elevations_from_rooms
description: Create interior elevation or section views from rooms

name: create_filled_region
description: Create 2D filled regions (hatched areas) in views with specified boundaries and fill patterns

name: create_floor
description: Create floor elements from boundary points or room boundaries

name: create_grid
description: Create grid system with smart spacing generation for project layout (alphabetic/numeric naming)

xCount.description: Number of grid lines along X-axis (vertical grids)

xSpacing.description: Spacing between X-axis grid lines in millimeters

xStartLabel.description: Starting label for X-axis grids (e.g., "A" or "1")

yCount.description: Number of grid lines along Y-axis (horizontal grids)

ySpacing.description: Spacing between Y-axis grid lines in millimeters

yStartLabel.description: Starting label for Y-axis grids (e.g., "1" or "A")

xExtentMin.description: Minimum extent along X-axis in millimeters (from project base point)

xExtentMax.description: Maximum extent along X-axis in millimeters (from project base point)

yExtentMin.description: Minimum extent along Y-axis in millimeters (from project base point)

yExtentMax.description: Maximum extent along Y-axis in millimeters (from project base point)

elevation.description: Elevation for grid lines in millimeters (Z-coordinate)

xStartPosition.description: Starting position for first X-axis grid in millimeters

yStartPosition.description: Starting position for first Y-axis grid in millimeters

name: create_level
description: Create levels at specified elevations with automatic floor plan view generation

elevation.description: Elevation of the level in millimeters

isMainLevel.description: Optional parameter to indicate if this is a main level

isBuildingStory.description: Optional parameter to indicate if this level should be used for building story

computationHeight.description: Optional parameter to indicate if this level should be used for computation

viewPlanOffset.description: Optional parameter to indicate if this level should be used for view plan

viewSectionOffset.description: Optional parameter to indicate if this level should be used for view section

viewElevationOffset.description: Optional parameter to indicate if this level should be used for view elevation

createFloorPlan.description: Whether to create a floor plan view for this level (default: true)

createCeilingPlan.description: Whether to create a ceiling plan view for this level (default: true)

name: create_line_based_element
description: Create line based element such as wall

name: create_placeholder_sheets
description: Create, list, convert, or delete placeholder sheets

name: create_point_based_element
description: Create point-based elements like furniture

rotation.description: Rotation angle (degrees), used for non-hosted elements (e.g. furniture)

hostWallId.description: Explicit host wall ElementId, -1 means auto-detect

facingFlipped.description: Whether to flip door/window facing direction

name: create_revision
description: List, create revisions, or add revisions to sheets for documentation tracking

name: create_room
description: Create and place rooms at specified locations with custom names, numbers, and properties

name: create_schedule
description: Create schedule views with fields, filters, and sorting

templateId.description: Template view unique ID to apply

fieldType.description: Field type (Instance, Type, Count, Formula, Phasing)

isCalculatedField.description: Whether the field is a calculated field

width.description: Width of the field in pixels

formatOption.description: Format option (e.g. DUT_METERS for length, or custom format string)

useThousandSeparator.description: Use thousand separator for numeric fields

fields.description: Fields to include in the schedule

fieldIndex.description: Field index to filter by (alternative to name)

filters.description: Filters to apply to the schedule

clearExistingFilters.description: Clear existing filters before applying new ones

fieldIndex.description: Field index to sort by (alternative to name)

clearExistingSorts.description: Clear existing sorts before applying new ones

fieldIndex.description: Field index to group by (alternative to name)

clearExistingGroups.description: Clear existing groups before applying new ones

name: create_sheet
description: Create sheets with title blocks for documentation

revisionIds.description: Revision IDs to apply to the sheet

name: create_structural_framing_system
description: Create structural beam framing system with configurable spacing and direction

levelName.description: Name of the level to place the beam system on

xMin.description: Minimum X coordinate of rectangular boundary in millimeters

xMax.description: Maximum X coordinate of rectangular boundary in millimeters

yMin.description: Minimum Y coordinate of rectangular boundary in millimeters

yMax.description: Maximum Y coordinate of rectangular boundary in millimeters

directionEdge.description: Which edge defines the beam direction: "bottom", "right", "top", or "left"

beamTypeName.description: Beam family type name (optional, auto-selects if not provided)

elevation.description: Elevation offset from level in millimeters

is3d.description: Whether to create a 3D beam system

name: create_surface_based_element
description: Create surface-based elements like floors

innerLoops.description: Inner loops (List<List<JZLine>> type, representing one or more inner loops)

name: create_text_note
description: Create text note annotations in views

name: create_view
description: Create views (FloorPlan, CeilingPlan, Section, Elevation, 3D)

levelElevation.description: Level elevation in millimeters (for plan views)

templateId.description: Template view unique ID to apply

name: create_view_filter
description: Create, apply, or list view filters for controlling element visibility

name: create_views_from_rooms
description: Auto-create callout, section, or elevation views from rooms with naming patterns

name: delete_element
description: Deletes elements using ElementId

name: delete_selection
description: Delete a saved selection from the Revit document

name: duplicate_sheet_with_content
description: Duplicate sheets with all content: views, legends, schedules in exact positions

name: duplicate_sheet_with_views
description: Duplicate a sheet with its views, legends, and schedules. Views can be duplicated or shared

name: duplicate_view
description: Duplicate views with options: independent, dependent, or with detailing

name: export_elements_data
description: Export elements by category with selected parameters, filtering, and CSV/JSON output. Core SheetLink feature.

name: export_families
description: Export family .rfa files from the current Revit model to a folder on disk

name: export_room_data
description: Extract all rooms with detailed properties including area, volume, perimeter, and parameters

name: export_schedule
description: Export schedule data to text/CSV file

name: export_shared_parameter_file
description: Export project shared parameters to a .txt file

name: export_to_excel
description: Export elements by category to Excel (.xlsx) with color-coded columns

name: filter_by_parameter_value
description: Deterministic element filter by parameter value with conditions (equals, contains, begins_with, etc.)

name: get_available_family_types
description: get available family types

name: get_current_view_elements
description: get current view elements

name: get_current_view_info
description: get current view info

name: get_element_parameters
description: Get all instance and type parameters of Revit elements by their IDs

name: get_elements_in_spatial_volume
description: Find elements contained within rooms, areas, or custom bounding boxes

name: get_linked_elements
description: Query elements from linked Revit models

name: get_material_properties
description: Get detailed structural, thermal, and appearance properties of a material

name: get_material_quantities
description: Calculate material quantities and takeoffs with area and volume calculations per material

name: get_materials
description: List all materials with properties including color, transparency, and asset availability

name: get_phases
description: Get all phases and phase filters from the project

name: get_project_info
description: Get project information including phases, worksets, links, and levels

name: get_schedule_data
description: Read schedule data or list all schedules in the project

name: get_selected_elements
description: get selected elements

name: get_shared_parameters
description: List all project parameters (shared and non-shared) bound to categories in the current Revit project

name: get_warnings
description: Get all warnings/errors in the current Revit model for quality auditing

name: get_worksets
description: List all worksets with properties including name, kind, open/editable status

name: import_from_excel
description: Import parameter values from Excel (.xlsx) back into Revit elements

name: import_table
description: Import a CSV/TSV file as a table into a Revit Legend or Drafting view with text notes in a grid

name: load_family
description: Load family files, list loaded families, or duplicate family types

name: load_selection
description: Load a saved selection by name, or list all saved selections

name: manage_links
description: List, reload, or unload linked Revit models

name: manage_project_parameters
description: Manage project parameters (CRUD): list, create, delete, or modify category bindings.

name: manage_unplaced_views
description: Identify and optionally delete views not placed on any sheet. Defaults to safe list/preview mode.

name: manage_view_templates
description: List, duplicate, delete, or rename view templates

name: match_element_properties
description: Copy parameter values from a source element to multiple target elements (match properties)

name: measure_between_elements
description: Measure distance between elements, points, or mixed references

name: modify_element
description: Move, rotate, mirror, or copy Revit elements

name: operate_element
description: Operate on elements (select, color, hide, isolate, etc)

elementIds.description: List of element IDs to operate on

action.description: Action to perform, stores the string value of the ElementOperationType enum

transparencyValue.description: Transparency value (0-100), higher values mean more transparent

colorValue.description: Set element color (RGB format), default is red

name: override_graphics
description: Set per-element graphic overrides in a view (line color, fill color, transparency, halftone, lineweight)

name: place_viewport
description: Place views on sheets as viewports

sheetId.description: Sheet ID to place viewport on

viewId.description: View ID to place in viewport

positionX.description: X position on sheet in millimeters

positionY.description: Y position on sheet in millimeters

displayTitle.description: Whether to display the view title

name: purge_unused
description: Identify and optionally remove unused families, types, and materials

name: rename_families
description: Batch rename Revit families with prefix, suffix, or find-and-replace operations

name: rename_views
description: Batch rename Revit views with prefix, suffix, or find-and-replace. Filter by view type or name pattern

name: renumber_elements
description: Sequentially renumber rooms, doors, windows, or parking elements by spatial order or custom sequence

name: save_selection
description: Save a named selection of elements using Revit SelectionFilterElement

name: say_hello
description: Displays a greeting dialog

name: section_box_from_selection
description: Create 3D view with section box fitted to selected elements with configurable offset

name: send_code_to_revit
description: Execute dynamic C# code in Revit with access to the Document and Revit API

name: set_element_parameters
description: Set parameter values on Revit elements (instance and type parameters)

name: set_element_phase
description: Set created and/or demolished phase on elements

name: set_element_workset
description: Move elements to a different workset

name: sync_csv_parameters
description: Import parameter values into elements from structured data with dry-run support

name: tag_rooms
description: Create tags for all rooms in the current view displaying room name and number

name: tag_walls
description: Tag all the walls in the model

name: transfer_parameters
description: Transfer parameter values from a source element to multiple target elements

name: workflow_clash_review
description: Detect clashes between two categories, isolate elements, and create section box

name: workflow_data_roundtrip
description: Export elements to Excel for roundtrip edit-and-reimport workflow

name: workflow_model_audit
description: Complete model health audit: score, warnings, families, CAD, purge candidates

name: workflow_room_documentation
description: Collect room data, create section views, and tag rooms in one call

name: workflow_sheet_set
description: Create a set of sheets with title blocks in one call
